<div class="sketch-board cover-board"><div class="board-label">SKETCH | NOTE WALL</div><div class="board-page">01 / 05</div><div class="scribble cover-link secondary" style="left:705.60px;top:297.60px;width:165.12px;--rot:-17.00deg;"></div><section class="paper-card tone-card tape hero-card" style="left:52.80px;top:96.00px;width:691.20px;height:436.80px;--rot:-2.00deg;"><div class="hero-card-inner"><h1 class="hero-title">把文档贴成<br />草图墙</h1><p class="hero-subtitle">纸张纹理、手写字体、wobble 边框、硬偏移阴影。看起来像 brainstorm 现场，而不是 polished 年报。</p></div></section><section class="paper-card tone-note tack corner-sticky" style="left:844.80px;top:129.60px;width:297.60px;height:148.80px;--rot:2.00deg;"><div class="sticky-inner center"><div class="sticky-label accent">Now</div><div class="sticky-copy">不做直线排版。<br />做一面工作板。</div></div></section></div>

---

<div class="sketch-board"><div class="board-label">SKETCH | TOKENS</div><div class="board-page">02 / 05</div><div class="slide-title" style="left:52.80px;top:86.40px;width:652.80px;height:38.40px;">四种手绘信号</div><section class="paper-card tone-card tape token-card" style="left:52.80px;top:192.00px;width:225.60px;height:201.60px;--rot:-2.00deg;"><div class="token-card-inner"><div class="token-name">Paper</div><div class="token-dot ink"></div></div></section><section class="paper-card tone-note tack token-card" style="left:336.00px;top:192.00px;width:225.60px;height:201.60px;--rot:1.80deg;"><div class="token-card-inner"><div class="token-name">Post-it</div><div class="token-dot ink"></div></div></section><section class="paper-card tone-card tape token-card" style="left:619.20px;top:192.00px;width:225.60px;height:201.60px;--rot:-1.00deg;"><div class="token-card-inner"><div class="token-name">Red Marker</div><div class="token-dot accent"></div></div></section><section class="paper-card tone-card tack token-card" style="left:902.40px;top:192.00px;width:225.60px;height:201.60px;--rot:2.00deg;"><div class="token-card-inner"><div class="token-name">Blue Pen</div><div class="token-dot secondary"></div></div></section><div class="summary-copy" style="left:52.80px;top:513.60px;width:825.60px;height:26.88px;">Warm paper + handwritten type + hard offset shadow + small rotation.</div></div>

<div class="sketch-board"><div class="board-label">SKETCH | SYSTEM</div><div class="board-page">03 / 05</div><div class="slide-title" style="left:52.80px;top:88.32px;width:806.40px;height:38.40px;">不是换色，是换工作现场</div><section class="paper-card tone-card tape system-card" style="left:52.80px;top:187.20px;width:288.00px;height:235.20px;--rot:-2.40deg;"><div class="system-card-inner"><div class="system-name">No straight lines</div><div class="system-body">有点歪，有点手写，像刚刚钉上去。</div></div></section><section class="paper-card tone-note tack system-card" style="left:427.20px;top:187.20px;width:288.00px;height:235.20px;--rot:1.20deg;"><div class="system-card-inner"><div class="system-name">Tape / tack</div><div class="system-body">有点歪，有点手写，像刚刚钉上去。</div></div></section><section class="paper-card tone-card system-card" style="left:801.60px;top:187.20px;width:288.00px;height:235.20px;--rot:-1.20deg;"><div class="system-card-inner"><div class="system-name">Hard shadow</div><div class="system-body">有点歪，有点手写，像刚刚钉上去。</div></div></section><div class="scribble system-line accent" style="left:177.60px;top:516.48px;width:907.20px;--rot:-1.60deg;"></div><div class="system-summary" style="left:192.00px;top:478.08px;width:902.40px;height:26.88px;">所有重点模块都应该像卡片，不像软件面板。</div></div>
